body:

| | Friend, Did you see Mark's email yesterday? I am following up on it because our records show you haven't had a chance to donate to the House DFL yet this year. Would you consider making your full refundable $50 (or $100 per couple) donation today? _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ _ _ [**Refundable $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ro0ssRWlOHn75FPo43M2O0fFla4yR1Ql5UUusR__sD4=/dCJBQ32AmKKQK4HmE8CWyhSJbKakDvHCU3gTuP8B2_Y=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=042521) [**Refundable $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ro0ssRWlOHn75FPo43M2O0fFla4yR1Ql5UUusR__sD4=/dCJBQ32AmKKQK4HmE8CWyhSJbKakDvHCU3gTuP8B2_Y=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=042521) Thanks to your support, we reached our 30 PCR donor goal this morning, and now I am hoping we can reach 50 by the end of the night. Can you help out, friend? Time is of the essence and we need to get our organizing efforts moving to protect our House DFL Majority. Too much is on the line. Thank you, Ryan Winkler Majority Leader Minnesota House of Representatives \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: **Mark Warren** <house@dflhouse.com>
Date: Sat, Apr 24, 2021 at 9:35 AM
Subject: Refund Friend, Exciting news: the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program was renewed for 2021! **Each year you have the opportunity as a Minnesotan to make a fully refundable $50 (or $100 per couple) donation to a campaign.** Your contribution to the House DFL will help us organize local candidates all across the state. Will you make a contribution today? _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ _ _ [**Refundable $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ro0ssRWlOHn75FPo43M2O0fFla4yR1Ql5UUusR__sD4=/dCJBQ32AmKKQK4HmE8CWyhSJbKakDvHCU3gTuP8B2_Y=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=042521) [**Refundable $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ro0ssRWlOHn75FPo43M2O0fFla4yR1Ql5UUusR__sD4=/dCJBQ32AmKKQK4HmE8CWyhSJbKakDvHCU3gTuP8B2_Y=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=042521) Our organizing efforts are starting now because we need to do everything we can to protect our House DFL Majority next year. There is so much on the line if Republicans get full control of the Minnesota Legislature: voting restrictions, discrimination bills, and so much more. We hope to continue to earn your support. **I am hoping to reach 30 fully refundable PCR donations by the end of the weekend** , would you be able to help us reach that goal? Thank you, Mark Warren Finance Director Minnesota House DFL Campaign _ _ [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ro0ssRWlOHn75FPo43M2O0fFla4yR1Ql5UUusR__sD4=/dCJBQ32AmKKQK4HmE8CWyhSJbKakDvHCU3gTuP8B2_Y=?refcode=042521)

subject: Help Us Stop the Green New Deal

body:
The Green New Deal is a debacle - the Democrats need to be stopped!

| | |
---
| | Derek,

The Green New Deal is a disaster. In a long list of the Democrats’ bad ideas, it may be their worst one yet.

---
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fstop-the-green-new-deal/1/0100017909132b7a-a3e40601-bd3c-48b6-b831-f6739f52e8a6-000000/GV1Pm07oPLoLxXIt-B0_E3tTG2w=211)
---
| Democrats want to destroy the US economy, sacrifice energy independence, and leave 10 million Americans jobless just so they can push an ineffective and irrational climate agenda.

The Green New Deal would come at the cost of **$600,000 for EACH American household**. [If everyone receiving this email contributed $20](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fstop-the-green-new-deal/2/0100017909132b7a-a3e40601-bd3c-48b6-b831-f6739f52e8a6-000000/5Q1voAK2kgGkfbjg5jMkURGJN8I=211), we would be able to offset the cost for just ONE household.

[Help us defeat the Democrats in 2022.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fstop-the-green-new-deal/3/0100017909132b7a-a3e40601-bd3c-48b6-b831-f6739f52e8a6-000000/Q2eFXOm8WTqXsWlOpR9IZGA39Hc=211) They are more extreme than ever, and it’s time to put an end to their socialist proposals.

---

name: Missed Alert
subject: Trump & Pence are waiting...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Did you see this text from Vice President Mike Pence?

Hey Fellow Conservative, did you see this text from Vice President Mike Pence?
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GRyDYE9TQ4AKr5ltMHS6RlG-WJC-X0bDPfWfbzfS0BJE6Z4U-yMUt9YbcHxSZNfsISyA7g4jNQrWgVhhgDBv91ZCeO47zIMYBXIp2ryTtnJlukGyaROEerVxJXYe7dxHwxCxzFFXJMEebp9IsmEt__cITFL7nkN8VhQZrg8RxI5kDwnzIPo59WYYxoHkW7hE2xk1Fc17WYdlrBJc7MGuPzTNtqpfj9vSHw9FLQWNiFC1ome6D5-Yz5cqF0dMjKTKzoiJ0d3vlln-GZ5S_kgITBh0BNvFYfQ3GVVvxgXESsbqfRseBxbosE98E9T-3misfKb-QSjrGBFJaYp7r2e90mGzZm68m138CHP8RE7ihozsF-pc7pIpb1lcTtFC8rED0SBpgA6FniKGCe5TXUo-cvAKLVvVS9hchvWnLSSU12WmlZsBAAYkIw==&c=6Fh0uyjsNwfuZYBlXeV6ZZKsfSgeKSAr96X-1dUXTDZsSFvnCFVDqA==&ch=sQdx2GkHbfHx7ilP0qjTmkgvzfEWHbvl8A4eeB-0sXE82A_IHXMaCw==)

Mike Pence hand-picked top patriots to help him defend Trump's legacy. The Radical Left won't stop until America has gone full-blown socialist and **Trump 's legacy is TARNISHED. **

_Are you going to let Trump and Pence down? _

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Are we going to be short?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I am looking at our numbers before our End of Month Deadline for April -- the first monthly deadline since President Trump endorsed me
|
---
| | |
Friend,

**I am looking at our numbers before our End of Month Deadline for April -- the first monthly deadline since President Trump endorsed me.** His endorsement gave us a huge boost this month, but it energized the Democrats like you wouldn't believe.

We aren't sure we're going to make our goal, and I'll be honest, I noticed you haven't stepped up to donate towards our End of Month goal.

We are working our absolute hardest to combat the attacks by the radical Left. These attacks have increased since we received President Trump's complete and total endorsement -- new attack ads are being launched every week, targeting me for having his support.

Frankly, I'm proud to have President Trump's support. But it puts a target on my race, and if I don't have the resources to stay in this fight... Well, I hope it won't get to that point with your help, Friend.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uyC32U10UWumlWT9_DQ5bKQfhkvD8qo4IaazWwSJ2zZ30wt6qCfv1eCrNezpCh9vBu0gi_GWkRtj6wZmQmf0WY97KDqRvvswNArbnyuMbI5jwvlsPRoii4vAmUzjPFMpHM-9j-VORYA=&c=JHipDIWUPFOYcnAeAcfyvjDCzwcgdMtjpYDX2i2XEvhnu2UiPQSEUQ==&ch=gz8Bz-GqjMYON5GleCaZsOGw6BhQca_bMJTX7NiVTLAbzBQi7sH4tA==).

body:
We desperately need your help to build our defenses against the Left!

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xbEdFdEVHGIHwdBCQmxxVWEu-PJ4DyRMIkmSiwMj2viA60X6Ki_lFNzq5ntb1iG0xL3dxJxelH-reFR6emlgo4QunLDncL3YniUI4fXjBTAhHLWcy3STwVATM1Tw0LpCv8m0_MwWrDOUh_6u6eQ28rdXvJ3RQzbsGMld20H7i3-sT8RnNGNsmv4713Ns0JYj5MKaU9Er46EcZ7fszheR6oFi0een04GswnTNJ5yEK1-x0Uhx1Oa9lQGnuJ2sE0dzkTcm2byqHwkApvP4qp--ZPAX8nJm-OMoBcvAJDIL-RxqHSQmUpMUiP_lfcp98FcVBa37tWF1LO4sH6bsgta3vJ8nsiUuz6AXgP46o0XZr7GsRhAT_L2DuiaxBzjzmJMKWqQI8NkNElbj8-R0A5nOpJaCI6HQmzYX_kVqPZNa4u8lZmM4yXAvwJ7SnnK7n5hUMjWQhKQAnnBZUitD6CbUmzZa5ZP6frzp&c=i1esgz3n4zHgwE0tAjwp63_mAaNcUf4w-Jk_Bv3s53RUL9XcUWPJyQ==&ch=oLY2Yn6IhH_E8jZXNBrFCrpTPLjLcQh3BbaB--1QdsZMnEu2HbqHzg==)
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: re: FIRE Fauci
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this [link](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57238105:JZbh2euQN:m:1:3206719985:3A2AFD2EF9F85C4603B8988BF5896933:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57238106:JZbh2euQN:m:1:3206719985:3A2AFD2EF9F85C4603B8988BF5896933:r) | |
---
Peter, the COVID hysteria has gone on far too long.

The mainstream media has elevated Dr. Fauci as an expert on Coronavirus, but the truth is, he's nothing more than a dramatic actor putting on a show for his liberal followers.

He has completely embraced theatrics and abandoned science.

Every time he makes a demand for more lockdowns, more regulation, more useless rules, his own power increases. And you lose freedom.

If you ask me, enough is enough! It's time to FIRE FAUCI. If you agree, please chip in today to join my fight.
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57238107:JZbh2euQN:m:1:3206719985:3A2AFD2EF9F85C4603B8988BF5896933:r)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57238108:JZbh2euQN:m:1:3206719985:3A2AFD2EF9F85C4603B8988BF5896933:r)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57238109:JZbh2euQN:m:1:3206719985:3A2AFD2EF9F85C4603B8988BF5896933:r)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57238110:JZbh2euQN:m:1:3206719985:3A2AFD2EF9F85C4603B8988BF5896933:r)
**If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**
Peter, if we allow Dr. Fauci to continue selling the "safety at all costs" narrative, we're never going to be a free country again.

There's no vaccine, no law, and no regulation that will satisfy a power-hungry bureaucrat like this.

While he parades around in two masks - after his vaccination - Americans are struggling. His politically motivated performance is a slap in the face to our children who need open schools, working moms and dads who need jobs, and Americans who want to get back on track.

**I'm sick of this theater. I'm sick of this whole thing. That's why I'm putting my foot down. It's time to FIRE FAUCI and if you agree I hope you'll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2252009/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57238106:JZbh2euQN:m:1:3206719985:3A2AFD2EF9F85C4603B8988BF5896933:r)**

I refuse to allow this chaos to become permanent, Peter.

We can't let unelected bureaucrats like Fauci destroy our economy and our very way of life.

I have real power as a U.S. Senator to expose him for what he is and finally FIRE FAUCI, but I can't do it alone.

**I need to show strength against the bureaucracy. Would you please chip in[$100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57238111:JZbh2euQN:m:1:3206719985:3A2AFD2EF9F85C4603B8988BF5896933:r), [$50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57238112:JZbh2euQN:m:1:3206719985:3A2AFD2EF9F85C4603B8988BF5896933:r), [$25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57238106:JZbh2euQN:m:1:3206719985:3A2AFD2EF9F85C4603B8988BF5896933:r), or [$10](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57238113:JZbh2euQN:m:1:3206719985:3A2AFD2EF9F85C4603B8988BF5896933:r) to help out? **

Together, I know you and I can stop them. And we can't give up until we do.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul
---

Friend,
At the start of this year, I promised that Iowa was coming back stronger than ever. That's why I made it a priority to:
✅ _Completely reopen the state of Iowa_

✅ _100% in the classroom learning option_

✅ _Legislation that helps expand access to broadband (Passed unanimously)_

✅ _Enact legislation that protects law-abiding citizens ' right to bear arms_

✅ _Ensure Iowa elections are fair and free of fraud_
In Iowa, I am working with my team to do everything I can to ensure that we're coming back stronger than ever. And don't just take my word for it... earlier this year USA News ranked Iowa the #1 state in Opportunity!
But, Friend, the Left is fighting back. They attacked Georgia over their elections reforms and now Democrats are lining up to attack our efforts to protect our own elections and your 2nd amendment rights. **Help me fight back!**

clean_body: %%First Name%%, here's a quick snapshot of where we're at. == Friend, At the start of this year, I promised that Iowa was coming back stronger than ever. That's why I made it a priority to: ✅ Completely reopen the state of Iowa ✅ 100% in the classroom learning option ✅ Legislation that helps expand access to broadband (Passed unanimously) ✅ Enact legislation that protects law-abiding citizens ' right to bear arms ✅ Ensure Iowa elections are fair and free of fraud In Iowa, I am working with my team to do everything I can to ensure that we're coming back stronger than ever. And don't just take my word for it... earlier this year USA News ranked Iowa the #1 state in Opportunity! But, Friend, the Left is fighting back. They attacked Georgia over their elections reforms and now Democrats are lining up to attack our efforts to protect our own elections and your 2nd amendment rights. Help me fight back! == == == == == == == == Our success here in Iowa couldn't be done without your support, Friend. Help us fight back and keep Iowa moving in the right direction. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9474840/224717773/188340/10/).

name: Giffords.org
subject: The NRA just launched a $2mil campaign against universal background checks
body:
#

Friends,
Right now, the NRA is waging a $2 million campaign to stop commonsense gun safety measures.
The NRA knows how popular universal background checks are with the American people. But they don't want to see universal background checks become law, so they're spending MILLIONS to spread fear and lies.
This is a all hands on deck moment, so we have to ask:
[**Can you make a $5 donation to Giffords PAC? We need the resources to go head-to-head with the NRA and pass background checks that will save lives.**](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee0a7/78fba3aa/7c71d004/50a920e4/978617290/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?refcode=em210425-1-full")
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:
| [Donate $10](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee0a7/78fba3aa/7c71d004/50a920f9/978617290/VEsHAQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em210425-1-full") | [Donate $25](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee0a7/78fba3aa/7c71d004/50a920f8/978617290/VEsHAA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210425-1-full")
---|---
[Donate $50](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee0a7/78fba3aa/7c71d004/50a920fb/978617290/VEsHAw/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210425-1-full") | [Donate $100](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee0a7/78fba3aa/7c71d004/50a920fa/978617290/VEsHAg/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210425-1-full")
---|---
[Donate $250](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee0a7/78fba3aa/7c71d004/50a920fd/978617290/VEsHDQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210425-1-full") | [Other amount](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee0a7/78fba3aa/7c71d004/50a920e6/978617290/VEsHDA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210425-1-full")
---|---
$5 may not seem like a lot compared to $2 million. But the truth is, most of our fundraising comes from emails like these. And when you donate $5, and the next person reading this email donates $5 it adds up quickly.
If everyone reading this email donates $5, we will have the resources we need to stop the NRA's misinformation campaign about universal background checks.
Our priority is saving lives -- not spreading lies. So thank you for helping us fight back against the NRA.
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee0a7/78fba3aa/7c71d004/50a920e4/978617290/VEsEBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?refcode=em210425-1-full")**
**_P.S. If you aren 't able to make a donation but would still like to get involved, you can text UNIVERSAL to 34131 to get connected with your senators today!_**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee0a7/78fba3aa/7c71d004/50a920fc/978617290/VEsEBA/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

Peter, we wanted to provide you with a short roundup of Gov. John Kasich's recent activities:
|
---
**The Future of the GOP:**

Gov. Kasich is often asked about the status of the Republican Party and what he thinks needs to happen to heal the divisions in our country. [Watch this latest clip](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=c988b0795f31480c9bd2f9595a38de36&_e=Hr6iL10yP-YgRj8g0A7StDJQOjzEsEEAqdZd6YxQMBmrUY3SWy7GiWw2Bt-WPmJ7cUa-4ownbHWemgj3JBYSv-7QgBR1sii436sObcDl_4_COOteiLKTVa683vcicESpCk6Hj6yXEr-9vT9GmFfG12l6Z2ZA2rhRsTRobIfShPYJ5UekGGsTtQblg7dXi-8A_43plomEIkUm3TkNCO65Sl2v_u5gpebSHFuKubs2IT9yoF5dncCFwj62oqZ54CxqJG5ESC-nmxMzroxdwU6gud6upt3MWgT33oA1WAmapisVV5ZM2LUHKqg7I3xjTA-C) and please consider sharing your thoughts with us.

|
---
**PBS Interview:**

Gov. Kasich also participated in a PBS interview with Christiane Amanpour where they discussed a range of current events and issues. [You can watch it here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=c988b0795f31480c9bd2f9595a38de36&_e=Hr6iL10yP-YgRj8g0A7StKozUksgXxtqTIGO-nqVvC5X2Gy0tRzD6fjAgKoTEsIHZFG6eGKFtXX_CQPUZmYTKi8KWEiDP-Ts2tW3V0aaNmM9uXYcmUuThWqzdansvqniyTNnmVdh_VcaePQc0fKpZAebLyQQikWLPs3qyQ-PZ6WFVC0ZW4u5sM8SqMNQtjbFQc5onTMhMhqCGONK57-xTqYFQlZUWTd9eyjLLhdUzdAn5E6f8l2WADQY8iPRxYLhWQsuiyOqgu9G5HQbO6YlwOXyQQPehIvqrA80r4iN20k%3D).
[](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=c988b0795f31480c9bd2f9595a38de36&_e=Hr6iL10yP-YgRj8g0A7StKozUksgXxtqTIGO-nqVvC5X2Gy0tRzD6fjAgKoTEsIHZFG6eGKFtXX_CQPUZmYTKj0pg97oWVJwjKe0olhRywoDYZ4tGU_KS4skTJ40q5tpVnlXgNXAIei3-3yu_f8CGYCGkUyCbJp5sa7CVErRUIUGlmYgoQVFtgFKQ7-0_6lHZ6uWZ8SDedFNRwNJAC_agpMglAbP77XxYCFCH2rh_ReFEGC7S-jiCEq9R3MKbrHb2h3OcLPQrZUkBge8EQ7wL0k6W3QuvvBx_QN_uSoed7A%3D)
|
---
**Improving Police and Community Relations:**

As the nation watched this past week to see the result of the Chauvin/George Floyd trial, Gov. Kasich joined Don Lemon to talk about the work Ohio has done to improve police and community relations, setting an example for other states to follow. name: Team Erica Smith
subject: [READ] Our plan to end poverty in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Did you see this?
#
We wanted to make sure you saw the email below. **If elected to the United States Senate, Erica will fight to establish a Universal Basic Income to eliminate poverty in America for good.**
Together, we can reimagine what our government is capable of, but it's important we build as much public support as possible right now. [**_Will you add your name to declare your support for a Universal Basic Income in America?**_](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/apem-ubi?refcode=em20210425-51&source=em20210425-51&t=1&akid=51%2E3698%2EpM5OnE)
**[Add your name »](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/apem-ubi?refcode=em20210425-51&source=em20210425-51&t=2&akid=51%2E3698%2EpM5OnE)**
\----Forwarded message----
From: Erica Smith
Subject: My plan to end poverty in America
We can eliminate poverty in America for good. That's why, as your senator, **I will fight for a Universal Basic Income, ensuring that every adult in America receives a $1,000 monthly recurring check.**
[**_I need to know if you're with me. Will you add your name and declare your support in bringing Universal Basic Income to a vote in Congress?**_](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/apem-ubi?refcode=em20210425-51&source=em20210425-51&t=3&akid=51%2E3698%2EpM5OnE)
**[Add your name »](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/apem-ubi?refcode=em20210425-51&source=em20210425-51&t=4&akid=51%2E3698%2EpM5OnE)**
During his 1964 Nobel Peace Prize address, Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. said: "_There is nothing new about poverty. What is new, however, is that we have the resources to get rid of it._ "
**What was true then, is true now. There is nothing new about poverty and we do have the resources to get rid of it.**
Dr. King championed a universal basic income because he knew it was the simplest and most effective approach to ending poverty in America.
At this moment, North Carolina families are facing multiple, converging crises — income inequality, generational poverty, and an economy that makes it increasingly difficult for working families and middle-class folks to get by. Now is not the time for small ideas or incremental reforms.
**It's time for bold and substantive change. It is time to reimagine what our government is capable of and transform our society into the Beloved Community Dr. King dreamed of and fought for.**
[**_If you agree, add your name to join me in the fight to end poverty in North Carolina and across our country by establishing a Universal Basic Income.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/apem-ubi?refcode=em20210425-51&source=em20210425-51&t=5&akid=51%2E3698%2EpM5OnE)_
This is personal for me. Growing up in eastern North Carolina, I know what it means to just barely get by, and I know what it would've meant to have extra resources to put food on the table and pay rent.
For too long, communities like mine have been left behind. Our struggles have gone unnoticed, and our cries for help, unheard — **that's why when I get to Washington, I'm taking all of us with me.**
Together, we can get cash into people's hands so they can survive and thrive. So they can escape cyclical, generational, and structural poverty. But I need you in this fight with me if we're going to pass a Universal Basic Income for all.
[**_Sign my petition if you support creating a Universal Basic Income program that will end poverty in America for good.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/apem-ubi?refcode=em20210425-51&source=em20210425-51&t=6&akid=51%2E3698%2EpM5OnE)_
Thank you for joining me,
Erica
**[Add your name »](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/apem-ubi?refcode=em20210425-51&source=em20210425-51&t=7&akid=51%2E3698%2EpM5OnE)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210425-51-footer&t=8&refcode2=51_3698_pM5OnE&akid=51%2E3698%2EpM5OnE)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=9&akid=51%2E3698%2EpM5OnE)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=51%2E3698%2EpM5OnE)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

At this moment, North Carolina families are facing multiple, converging crises — income inequality, generational poverty, and an economy that makes it increasingly difficult for working families and middle-class folks to get by. Now is not the time for small ideas or incremental reforms. It's time for bold and substantive change. It is time to reimagine what our government is capable of and transform our society into the Beloved Community Dr. King dreamed of and fought for. This is personal for me. Growing up in eastern North Carolina, I know what it means to just barely get by, and I know what it would've meant to have extra resources to put food on the table and pay rent. For too long, communities like mine have been left behind. Our struggles have gone unnoticed, and our cries for help, unheard — that's why when I get to Washington, I'm taking all of us with me. Together, we can get cash into people's hands so they can survive and thrive. So they can escape cyclical, generational, and structural poverty. But I need you in this fight with me if we're going to pass a Universal Basic Income for all. Thank you for joining me, Erica Email us: mailto: info@ericaforus.com

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: BY MIDNIGHT – Stand with Pro-Life!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Add your name – defend our pro-life values
We need to stand up. PeterI will **always** fight for the unborn children who can't defend themselves.But the radical anti-life liberals have been waiting for this moment for decades - when they've got pro-abortion majorities in Congress and a White House terrified to stand up to them.There's ONE way to make sure we stop them: TAKING BACK THE MAJORITY in Congress! We're only **_five seats away_ **from winning the majority back in 2022, and every single contribution you make and petition you sign, will help put us on the road to doing just that! **62 million children have been deprived of their right to life since Roe v. Wade. [Will you ADD YOUR NAME to fight for pro-life values in Congress?](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdhuhuk-ahkdjtlkr-r/)** [[ SIGN HERE ] - Defend the Right to Life](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdhuhuk-ahkdjtlkr-y/) In my first few months in Congress, I proudly put [action](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdhuhuk-ahkdjtlkr-j/) behind my promise to [defend the rights of the unborn](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdhuhuk-ahkdjtlkr-t/).
* I joined my Republican colleagues in reaffirming my commitment to the Hyde Amendment.
* I demanded that Joe Biden reverse his decision to allow your tax dollars to pay for abortions overseas.
* I supported a bill that requires medical care for children who survive abortions, and criminal penalties for anyone who fails to provide it.

Unfortunately, **we know the attacks on life are just beginning. **The radical liberals in Congress have _already_ launched all-out assaults on:
* The Second Amendment
* The Supreme Court
* The Integrity of our Elections
* Small Businesses
* Business taxes
* Police
* Our Energy Industry
* Border Security
* Our Schoolchildren
* Numerous Republicans they're trying to "cancel"
* Bipartisanship
* The Filibuster
* _and the list goes on and on!_

Just last week, the liberals' official bill to PACK THE COURT bill became real. **YOU CAN BE SURE THAT THEIR FOUR ADDITIONAL JUSTICES WILL ALL BE PRO-ABORTION! ****[This is OUR way of standing up and fighting back.](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdhuhuk-ahkdjtlkr-i/)****[Please, will you add your name immediately to your friends, family, and neighbors, to back the right to life?](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdhuhuk-ahkdjtlkr-d/)** -Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdhuhuk-ahkdjtlkr-h/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mdhuhuk-ahkdjtlkr-k/) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

_Peter, do you remember when America used to build things?_
I do - I'm Jeff Bartos, and I’m running as a Republican for the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania!
_
I’m a devoted husband, a proud father, and a lifelong Pennsylvanian, born and raised in Berks County, PA.
_

[](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=0fc95dbea02e4be08a5e81111797787b&_e=YJbwZTptlwDWF0VDca4wI-4jQXIZ0P_rD82NmQT2P1h2MiTi28tC5ngt_bq6Qb_fRDM99pVmoTLwiwtWdAd2v0DpfzJ8RhDpHRb52_g7RShsMukkoSrBlCb6wLWF02iSDENkvbzUMm6wWF46ePanbF3KijQ-dPAr36wHWxdfUtW5jJ0cfLtvfV6ZUwY955TMxzFSNRV1I6WYZ0e_1xhvs6pFcxe1Z39CA2DPuAxs4X4yvqrzKPc4gLqcZHzg8-ioxcdV9xz3n7UXQqKL0XyiRdQVtFJathwHkOK1h2OKZrzJijCc7Avkoqj5BPdiObIvmVeotZ328PxidM1621nGueRccJ3KfUFG-9ELr6AfIawFVw5AozAztjB2zcVFwy7jJbpBrQKVSFvjri981v-socw3z1TxUfYkEgCbTMCv9Uff4NL_f5T64_pAm1nwqmYVCZWSvcRXLdtbze3f2nK8AsJJ_I3zyvv_wL-LJluGfUSx4L3Zxa4PzqPVYAaSIWz7)
I’m not a career politician who has spent my life in Washington. I’ve spent my life honing my skills in business, creating jobs, and eventually working my way up to the highest levels of executive leadership. I know what it takes to build and run a successful business, and I’m proud to have provided great jobs to many Pennsylvanian families. **But do you know what I’ve been most proud of? **
_ _
**Rolling up my sleeves to help Pennsylvania small businesses and helping keep a handful of American Dreams alive!**
_ _
Peter, when people look around and see their elected officials spending more time attacking each other than attacking the problems that are crippling the community they get fed up. I looked at that and said I have to do something about it - and you know what? I did.

[](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=0fc95dbea02e4be08a5e81111797787b&_e=YJbwZTptlwDWF0VDca4wI-4jQXIZ0P_rD82NmQT2P1h2MiTi28tC5ngt_bq6Qb_fRDM99pVmoTLwiwtWdAd2v0DpfzJ8RhDpHRb52_g7RShsMukkoSrBlCb6wLWF02iSDENkvbzUMm6wWF46ePanbF3KijQ-dPAr36wHWxdfUtW5jJ0cfLtvfV6ZUwY955TMxzFSNRV1I6WYZ0e_1xhvs6pFcxe1Z39CA2DPuAxs4X4yvqrzKPc4gLqcZHzg8-ioxcdV9xz3n7UXQqKL0XyiRdQVtFJathwHkOK1h2OKZryzQ-PamrTfpbCix3ZEOptKbOQ1r1xYxgWMs4Dqz1zwXNh8p6MOrXswiD5-nrRWQUx-ucy7V_VzGeBIFrs1lC_Qdm2Pd3fkYUK_zxJ2ogzzp9e8A1ReVVmTRFlICpWVxZoHCCN0b6zGfSGaz_YOWjAUeJFs-kFsYxDxY-Y9H4KOXMJ3-bT5LbnWDlbl9eXPbYgcPEt-k_g8dsbRLHKpVtQp)
I created a non-profit that raised close to **$3.4 MILLION** and helped more than a **THOUSAND BUSINESSES** across Pennsylvania.

What we’ve seen over the last year is that the government continues to step in, time and again, in a way that favors the big companies at the expense of the little companies.
**Who are we as a society if all that’s left at the end of this pandemic are giant corporations?**

_Politicians talk. I’m running to get shit done._

**If you want to join me in my fight to get shit done in Washington, you can chip in at this secure link:[link/help-jeff-get-shit-done](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=0fc95dbea02e4be08a5e81111797787b&_e=YJbwZTptlwDWF0VDca4wI-4jQXIZ0P_rD82NmQT2P1h2MiTi28tC5ngt_bq6Qb_fRDM99pVmoTLwiwtWdAd2v0DpfzJ8RhDpHRb52_g7RShsMukkoSrBlCb6wLWF02iSDENkvbzUMm6wWF46ePanbF3KijQ-dPAr36wHWxdfUtW5jJ0cfLtvfV6ZUwY955TMxzFSNRV1I6WYZ0e_1xhvs6pFcxe1Z39CA2DPuAxs4X4yvqrzKPc4gLqcZHzg8-ioxcdV9xz3n7UXQqKL0XyiRdQVtFJathwHkOK1h2OKZrybaa2-mljDKlPs71VTT0Htc1DfyDC7MeSJvtsC2h4xayWTtE22kxUqgERnYE09M501BsZzi8GbjavTGHNEyTK_V-mr3PFQZUE4xz2R_ITwv3viDKy_hMnWW2IqPYHZGUxE5Cdkge4h7sR1EM3KFN745ZF-yN0l1Wy-S5bXcHK_5B7TqIPIxKtSq-378Glwn2JwrxDRT9xyD_lQleNz3SHV)**

clean_body: I'm Jeff Bartos, and I’m running as a Republican for the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania! | | Peter, do you remember when America used to build things? I do - I'm Jeff Bartos, and I’m running as a Republican for the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania! I’m a devoted husband, a proud father, and a lifelong Pennsylvanian, born and raised in Berks County, PA. I’m not a career politician who has spent my life in Washington. I’ve spent my life honing my skills in business, creating jobs, and eventually working my way up to the highest levels of executive leadership. I know what it takes to build and run a successful business, and I’m proud to have provided great jobs to many Pennsylvanian families. But do you know what I’ve been most proud of? Rolling up my sleeves to help Pennsylvania small businesses and helping keep a handful of American Dreams alive! Peter, when people look around and see their elected officials spending more time attacking each other than attacking the problems that are crippling the community they get fed up. I looked at that and said I have to do something about it - and you know what? I did. I created a non-profit that raised close to $3.4 MILLION and helped more than a THOUSAND BUSINESSES across Pennsylvania. What we’ve seen over the last year is that the government continues to step in, time and again, in a way that favors the big companies at the expense of the little companies. Who are we as a society if all that’s left at the end of this pandemic are giant corporations? Politicians talk. I’m running to get shit done. If you want to join me in my fight to get shit done in Washington, you can chip in at this secure link: Follow my fight on Social Media: Thank you, Jeff Bartos | | | Paid for by Bartos for US Senate | | 1152 Mae Street #129, Hummelstown, PA, 17036 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |
